# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

# ================================
# Kong Gateway - Production kong.conf
# ================================

# ----------------
# General
# ----------------
log_level = notice
anonymous_reports = off
nginx_daemon = on

# ----------------
# Proxy (Client Traffic)
# ----------------
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000 reuseport backlog=16384
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8443 http2 ssl reuseport backlog=16384

# ----------------
# Admin API / Admin GUI
# ----------------
# Restrict Admin API to private/internal network(s) only.
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001 reuseport backlog=16384
admin_listen = 10.0.0.10:8001 reuseport backlog=16384
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8444 http2 ssl reuseport backlog=16384
admin_listen = 10.0.0.10:8444 http2 ssl reuseport backlog=16384

# ----------------
# Database (PostgreSQL)
# ----------------
database = postgres
pg_host = postgres.internal
pg_port = 5432
pg_user = kong
pg_password = changeme-strong-password
pg_database = kong
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = on
pg_timeout = 5000

# ----------------
# Performance / Worker Tuning
# ----------------
nginx_worker_processes = auto
nginx_http_keepalive_requests = 10000
nginx_http_keepalive_timeout = 75s
nginx_http_client_body_buffer_size = 16k
nginx_http_client_max_body_size = 10m

# ----------------
# DNS / Upstreams
# ----------------
dns_resolver = 10.0.0.2:53,10.0.0.3:53
dns_order = LAST,A,CNAME,SRV
dns_valid_ttl = 30
dns_stale_ttl = 3600

# ----------------
# TLS (Certificates)
# ----------------
ssl_cert = /etc/kong/ssl/kong-proxy.crt
ssl_cert_key = /etc/kong/ssl/kong-proxy.key
admin_ssl_cert = /etc/kong/ssl/kong-admin.crt
admin_ssl_cert_key = /etc/kong/ssl/kong-admin.key

# ----------------
# Headers / Security
# ----------------
headers = off

# ----------------
# Paths
# ----------------
prefix = /var/run/kong
nginx_pid = /var/run/kong/kong.pid
client_body_temp_path = /var/run/kong/client_body_temp
proxy_access_log = /var/log/kong/proxy_access.log
proxy_error_log = /var/log/kong/proxy_error.log
admin_access_log = /var/log/kong/admin_access.log
admin_error_log = /var/log/kong/admin_error.log

# ----------------
# Plugins
# ----------------
plugins = bundled
